subcodes.first_line: O Taereh! Thy letter of gratitude for the arrival of their Honors, 'Azizu'llah Khan, Adbu'l-Hussein Khan and 'Ali Mohammed Khan hath arrived
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طائره نامه شما که تشکرنامه از ورود جناب عزیزالله خان و جناب عبدالحسین خان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @monasticism; asceticism, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
